calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Vicki Gross, #.

David Jung was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Erich Lachmann, Jr., individually and dba Turnpike Super Service, or Turnpike Super Service.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Erich Lachmann, Sr., individually and dba Turnpike Super Service, was filed on February 1, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 11, 2007.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff David Jung, and against the Defaulted Defendants Erich Lachmann, Jr., individually and dba Turnpike Super Service, and Turnpike Super Service as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,000.00.
Costs - $300.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $25,300.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
